|Neurothrope| Infantry (Character) | {{!!weapon-skill}} | {{!!ballistics-skill}} | {{!!strength}} | {{!!toughness}} | {{!!wounds}} | {{!!initiative}} | {{!!attacks}} | {{!!leadership}} | {{!!armor-save}} |

Unit Composition --- 1 {{!!title}}

{{||$:/templates/biomorphs-rules}}

;Psychic Powers
A {{!!caption}} generates its psychic powers from the ''Biomancy'', {{Broodmind||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Powers of the Hive Mind||$:/templates/tooltips}}, and ''Telepathy'' disciplines. A brood which includes a ''Neurothrope'' knows {{Spirit Leech||$:/templates/tooltips}} in addition to its other psychic powers so long as the ''Neurothrope'' is alive.

;Options
*May include up to five additional {{!!title}}s --- {{!!points}} points/model
*May take items from the {{Biomorphs||$:/templates/tooltips}} list.
*If the unit numbers three models or more, one {{!!title}} may be upgraded to a ''Neurothrope'' --- 20 points
*The unit may upgrade its Psyker Mastery Level to 3 --- 30 points
title: Zoanthrope
creator: Jeanbeaux
caption: Zoanthrope Brood
